ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dividend_payouts" (
  "payout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend payout */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ticker */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the payout (e.g., 2025e for 2025 estimate) */,
  "calendar_year_payout" REAL /* Total dividend payout for the calendar year */,
  "calendar_year_payout_growth" REAL /* Growth in dividend payout for the calendar year */,
  "pay_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend is paid */,
  "declared_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend is declared */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock goes ex-dividend */,
  "payout_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend payout */,
  "qualified_dividend" TEXT /* Whether the dividend is qualified */,
  "payout_type" TEXT /* Type of the dividend payout (e.g., Regular, Special) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the dividend payout (e.g., Quarterly, Annual) */,
  "days_taken_for_stock_price_to_recover" INTEGER /* Number of days it takes for the stock price to recover after the dividend is paid */,
  "yield_on_cost" REAL /* Yield on cost of the dividend payout */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the dividend is paid */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date shareholders must own the stock to receive the dividend */,
  "dividend_per_share" REAL /* Dividend amount per share */,
  "total_payout_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the dividend payout */,
  "payout_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dividend frequency */,
  "payout_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dividend type */,
  "qualified_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the qualified status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_payouts_payout_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("payout_frequency_id") REFERENCES dividend_frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_payouts_payout_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("payout_type_id") REFERENCES dividend_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_payouts_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_payouts_qualified_id FOREIGN KEY ("qualified_id") REFERENCES qualified_dividends ("qualified_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickers" (
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock ticker */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the ticker information was last updated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public */,
  "last_split_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock split */,
  "last_split_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of the last stock split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_growth" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth record */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ticker */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the growth record */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the dividend payout for the year */,
  "growth_period" TEXT /* Period over which the growth is calculated */,
  "growth_type" TEXT /* Type of growth calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_growth_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_yield" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield record */,
  "payout_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dividend payout */,
  "yield_on_cost" REAL /* Yield on cost of the dividend payout */,
  "as_of_date" TEXT /* Date when the yield was calculated */,
  "yield_period" TEXT /* Period over which the yield is calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_yield_payout_id FOREIGN KEY ("payout_id") REFERENCES dividend_payouts ("payout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the dividend type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dividend type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the dividend frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dividend frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qualified_dividends" (
  "qualified_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each qualified status */,
  "qualified_status" TEXT /* Status of the dividend (e.g., Qualified, Not Qualified) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the qualified status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualified_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ticker */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price, accounting for splits and dividends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ticker */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the performance period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the performance period */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Return percentage of the stock price */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the stock price */,
  "annualized_return" REAL /* Annualized return over the performance period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_performance_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Securely stored password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "payout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dividend payout being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the payout */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the payout was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_payout_id FOREIGN KEY ("payout_id") REFERENCES dividend_payouts ("payout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio holding */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user holding the stock */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the holding based on the latest stock price */,
  "gain_loss" REAL /* Gain or loss on the holding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
